calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption; Notice Of Oppos To Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Feb-18-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION (of Claimant Stephen Forest Haverland). No appearances. The court modified its ruling and took the matter off calendar per the notice of withdrawal filed February 17, 2011. Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi; Not reported

Notice And Motion For Appointment Of A Receiver And To Appoint Richard B. Cole As Receiver
Off Calendar Oct-05-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances, tentative ruling is adopted. Plaintiff Creditors Trade association, Inc.'s Motion for appointment of receiver, and to appoint Richard B. Cole as receiver, granted. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.
